Calculation.Text: "Translation"

StyledText.Data: Follow localisation process stage by stage. If breaking the process, use tools for improvising.

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation"
"Start machine translation of texts that have been changed since last translation or haven't been translated yet."

StyledText.Data: Translate texts using selected machine translation API.
Create files to send to translation agency
When files are translated - import files from agency.

Calculation.Text: "Import translated text delivered from translators"
"Import translated text delivered from translators"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 3 Or FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Human translation" Or Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
"Prepare database and export translation files"
"Prepare database and export translation files"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Human translation" Or Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
"Start machine translation of texts that have been changed since last translation or haven't been translated yet."
IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation API ) Or FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation"
"Select a machine translation API"
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "event_text" ; "Manual change of translation method to " & FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method)
"Select a machine translation API"
IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
"Select a machine translation API"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation" Or Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation"
"Select a machine translation API"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation" Or IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
"Localisation"
"Refresh localisation status"
"Tools"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not reviewed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage <4

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated" )& SetProperty ( "exception" ; "Reviewed" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage <2
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Not translated" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage <2
"Get texts from the asynchronous machine translation service"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 3 Or FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation" Or Not Translation API @ Package::Asynchronous

StyledText.Data: Fetch text that couldn't be translated directly. Only for asynchronous APIs.

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 3 Or FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation" Or Not Translation API @ Package::Asynchronous
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation code
"Export all texts to a Word document (HTML)"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 4

StyledText.Data: Export all translated texts to a Word document

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 4
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "status" ; "Approved" )
"Change status for all texts in this localisation"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 4
"Log"

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "progress" )
"Logs the current approval progress in percent."
FAT Localisation Log @ Package::Event
"Write a note to add to the event log"

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage )
"Start machine translation"

StyledText.Data: Add a note to event log

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "size" )
"Logs the current number of texts that belongs to the localisation."

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage ) & SetProperty ( "status_type" ; "status" )
"Logs the current status of all texts."

StyledText.Data: View and log history of all events happened in the process of this localisation.

Calculation.Text: "Reviewers"

StyledText.Data: These are the external reviewers of this localisation. Add a new reviewer in FAT User administration.
Package localisation - <<FAT Title::Reference title>> • <<FAT Package::Reference name>>
Translation to <<FAT Localisation @ Package::Language in Country>> (<<Localisation code>>)

Stage Name Text status HT Text status MT 1. Language added - (text does not exist) - (text does not exist) 2. Text prepared for translation Not translated Not translate 3. Original text sent Not translated Translation id:¶[id_from_api] (async only) 4. Translated text imported Not reviewed Not reviewed 5. Translation in review In progress In progress 6. Translation approved Approved Approved

Calculation.Text: "Set the translation stage for this translation"
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )

SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package localisation" ) & SetProperty ( "localisation_id" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "localisation_stage" ; FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage)
"Set the translation stage for this translation"
IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )

StyledText.Data: Stage 1 - Language added The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created. Stage 2 - Text prepared for translation Press the button “Translate” to translate all items included in this Title/Packager. A machine translation handles stage 2, 3 and 4 automatically. Stage 3 - Send text to translation API. All texts are sent to translation the selected translation API. Stage 4 - Translated text imported When translated texts recieved from the API, import texts back to the CMT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT. Stage 5 -Translation in review During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT. If a new machine translation is made existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts. Stage 6 - Translated text approved Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

CharacterStyle.Text: The language is added to this Title/Package but no localised items have yet been created.
Press the button “Translate” to translate all items included in this Title/Packager. A machine translation handles stage 2, 3 and 4 automatically.
All texts are sent to translation the selected translation API.
When translated texts recieved from the API, import texts back to the CMT. These texts will be set to status “In progress”. Publish a ML Beta - a localised version using normal export in FAT.
During and after the Beta test - text will be edited directly in FAT. If a new machine translation is made existing texts that are not marked “Approved” will be overwritten with updated texts.
Publish an approved ML Master - a localised version using normal export in FAT.

Calculation.Text: FAT Localisation @ Package::Translation method ≠ "Machine translation"
"If original texts are added after localisation started - this is a way to re-create them"
"If original texts are added after localisation started - this is a way to re-create them"
FAT Localisation @ Package::Localisation stage < 4

StyledText.Data: This localisation belongs to a Title localisation. Some tools are controlled by the Title localisation.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id )
"Disconnect this localisation from Title localisation"
IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation @ Package::Title localisation id ) Or FAT Localisation @ Package::Shared text localisation

StyledText.Data: This field must be present - used for import

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation::Translation provider )
